messages.content:
Medium — fuzzy intent needs crystallizing before implementation.

Using crystallize: I hear the half-formed goal as "make expired auth feel recoverable and trustworthy instead of surprising." You might be assuming the right answer is a modal, but the product shape may be clearer status, preserved work, and a direct re-auth path.

A sharper target: when auth expires, the sample app should explain what happened, preserve user input, and offer one obvious way to continue.
